description: Use semantic search to find technologies similar to a given description. Returns repositories with metrics and analysis that match the search criteria.

configuration.query: FROM technology-research METADATA _score | WHERE semantic_content:?description | SORT _score DESC | KEEP repo, timestamp, tags, analysis.viability_score, analysis.summary, _score | LIMIT ?limit

description.description: Natural language description of the technology or use case to search for

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 5)
